note: This release's v1.6.5 `ccusage --json` run against the 12-turn scenario is pending — the release ships the scenario as a committed artifact and reports the static resident-prompt savings below, which is the honest upper bound: full ccusage will include live API output that v1.6.5 does not change. Do not claim more than these static numbers.
caveats: Steel + alloy + CLAUDE.md are loaded on every turn. Review agents are loaded only when fired (post-impl review gate).
_review-template.md is loaded transitively when any of sentinel/iridium/cobalt/flint fires. Net per-turn savings for a steel-only session is higher than 22.6%.
The 4-bytes-per-token heuristic is ROUGH. Claude's tokenizer varies. Use as directional only.
Live ccusage --json measurement over the committed 12-turn scenario is the next step. Numbers here are the honest STATIC upper-bound contribution from prompt slimming alone.
